creator: shigeru@iij.ad.jp
text:
in -current, after 2010-01-13, "utmp.h" is move to "utmpx.h".
So, need to change codes which include "utmp.h".

Fix: add a patch to 'files' directory.


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 1) update -current system to '2010-01-13' or later (make buildworld && make installworld)
2) cd @ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/
3) make
